1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: B, C, D, E, F, G, I, J, K. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

2.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are an expert SVG path parser and geometry educator. Given a text containing an SVG path element and a set of geometric shape options, analyze the path\'s vector commands ("M", "L", "A") and coordinates to determine which geometric shape is depicted. Choose the most appropriate option from the list and provide only the shape category name as your answer.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

))
